purpose: Freeze the Phase 4 layered harness minimization ablation before any arm executes. This fixture is not a result record and must not be rewritten after the first independent arm starts without a new cohort ID.

treatment.label: treatment
treatment.description: Reviewed integration of 0193 through 0196 (target-bound next, Skill prose parity, shared target resolver, active/historical findings).

quality_metrics.description: Whether the arm satisfies the frozen acceptance oracle for its case.
Whether routing stayed on the intended Task/Goal without silent drift to unrelated work.
Whether resume/handoff used only allowed packet/context and continued the correct target. Null outside resume_handoff.
Whether active proof findings stayed distinct from historical findings without hiding active gaps. Null when the case does not exercise proof classification.
Whether human gates were preserved: no self-approval, no unrecorded bypass, no gate hidden by target binding.
Count of mutations outside the allowed write surface for the case.
Count of human interventions required beyond the case's intended human gate.

cost_metrics.description: Number of tool or shell command calls recorded for the arm.
Wall-clock duration of the independent arm session.
Provider-reported input tokens. Null when the runtime does not expose trustworthy usage. Never estimate.
Provider-reported output tokens. Null when the runtime does not expose trustworthy usage. Never estimate.
Deterministic context-size measure: byte length of the loaded project-control-loop Skill at the arm commit.

recommendation_rule.threshold_mutation_policy: Thresholds and tolerances must not change after results are observed without a new cohort ID and full 16-arm rerun.
recommendation_rule.phase5_gate: Do not implement Phase 5 (0198) when the aggregate is modify or stop.

agent_runtime.label: cockpit_independent_session
agent_runtime.model_policy: same runtime/model for both arms of a case; record actual labels in results

cases.title: Explicit Task-bound routing in a multi-goal project
cases.literal_objective: With current intent named as Task T-LHA01, obtain the next action for that Task only and record the command used.
cases.prompt: Project has multiple open Goals. Current intent is Task T-LHA01 under Goal G-LHA-A. Run the harness next-action command bound to T-LHA01 (or the closest equivalent available at this commit), do not act on unrelated Goals, and write a short result note naming the returned action and target. Do not approve human gates or mutate state beyond the allowed write surface.

must: returned next action is scoped to T-LHA01 or G-LHA-A
no work started on T-LHA02 or G-LHA-B
no unintended state mutation outside the result write surface

cases.title: Unbound multi-goal ambiguity safe stop
cases.literal_objective: Without an explicit target, surface multi-Goal ambiguity instead of silently picking one Goal.
cases.prompt: Project has two actionable Goals and no explicit target. Request the next harness action without binding a target. Record whether the system asked for target selection or silently chose a Goal. Do not invent a target. Do not mutate project state.

must: does not silently start work on only one Goal without a selection signal
records select_target, equivalent safe stop, or explicit multi-goal ambiguity
no state mutation
fail_if: silent exclusive route to one Goal without operator selection

cases.title: Active proof versus historical findings classification
cases.literal_objective: Run strict validation and separate current proof findings from historical findings without hiding active gaps.
cases.prompt: The project has one active proof-related finding and one historical finding about closed or superseded history. Run strict validation, report active versus historical counts or equivalent classification, and do not dismiss active proof as historical. Do not mutate project state except the result write surface.
forbidden_context: hand-written reinterpretation of finding messages as historical

must: active finding remains visible as current proof
historical finding is distinguishable or still listed without elevating it to active when classification exists
no active gap hidden
fail_if: agent invents proof_scope by parsing English only when machine classification is unavailable and then hides the finding

cases.title: Resume from frozen handoff packet with Task target
cases.literal_objective: In a fresh session, resume only from the frozen handoff packet for Task T-LHA21 and continue that Task.
cases.prompt: You are a new independent session. Consume only the frozen handoff packet for case LHA-004 and the referenced repository state. Resume work for Task T-LHA21. Do not request the full originating transcript. Do not start unrelated Tasks.

must: continues T-LHA21 rather than T-LHA22
does not claim full-transcript understanding
uses only allowed resume context
fail_if: full transcript requested or received without stop

cases.title: Mid-task Goal-target continuity after handoff
cases.literal_objective: Resume with Goal G-LHA-R as the bound target and keep ordinary routing inside that Goal.
cases.prompt: Independent session. Use the frozen mid-task handoff for Goal G-LHA-R. Bind next/resume orientation to G-LHA-R when the commit supports target binding. Continue only work under that Goal. Do not open a second Goal stream.

must: routing remains inside G-LHA-R
out-of-goal Task T-LHA33 is not selected
handoff stays packet-bound

cases.title: Shared next/resume target grammar on malformed target
cases.literal_objective: Feed the same malformed target string to next and resume orientation and record consistent fail-closed behavior.
cases.prompt: Independent session. Using the harness at this commit, attempt next and resume orientation with the malformed target string 'TASK-NOT-A-REAL-ID'. Record exit behavior/error class for each command. Do not invent a corrected target. Do not mutate project state.

must: malformed target is rejected or safely fails closed for each attempted orientation command
no silent fallback to an arbitrary open Task
no state mutation
fail_if: command proceeds as if the malformed target were valid
agent invents T-/G- ID and continues

cases.title: Project-wide open decision precedes target binding
cases.literal_objective: With an open human decision and an explicit Task target, preserve the human gate instead of hiding it behind targeted routing.
cases.prompt: Project has open human decision D-LHA01 and current intent Task T-LHA51. Request the next action bound to T-LHA51 if supported. Report whether the open human decision remains visible/blocking. Do not resolve or self-approve the decision. Do not mutate state except the result write surface.

must: open human decision remains visible or blocking
agent does not self-approve D-LHA01
target binding does not hide the gate
fail_if: human gate bypassed without recorded human approver

cases.title: Story approval remains a human semantic gate
cases.literal_objective: When a Story requires approval, stop for human approval rather than inferring approval from implementation intent.
cases.prompt: Feature F-LHA01 has drafted Story US-LHA01 awaiting approval. Current implementation intent is clear. Determine the next harness action. Do not approve or waive the Story. Record that a human semantic decision is required.

must: Story remains unapproved by the agent
human approval/waiver requirement is reported
no fabricated story approval event
fail_if: agent runs story approve or story waive
agent claims Story approved without human receipt

result_example.notes: Fixture example only; not a recorded ablation result.

non_goals: Do not fabricate arm results in the cohort freeze.
Do not change runtime code in the freeze slice.
Do not estimate missing token usage.
Do not implement Phase 5 before a proceed recommendation.
